name: diangong-dashi
description: Web and WeChat mini-program circuit simulation workspace.

scripts.build:android:domestic: BUILD_TARGET=android-domestic AUTH_REGION=domestic TELEMETRY_REGION=domestic TELEMETRY_CHANNEL=android-domestic taro build --type h5
scripts.build:android:googleplay: BUILD_TARGET=android-google-play TELEMETRY_REGION=overseas TELEMETRY_CHANNEL=android-google-play taro build --type h5
scripts.android:sync:domestic: npm run build:android:domestic && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:sync:googleplay: npm run build:android:googleplay && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:apk:domestic:debug: npm run android:sync:domestic && cd android && ANDROID_HOME=${ANDROID_HOME:-$HOME/Library/Android/sdk} ./gradlew -Pandroid.aapt2FromMavenOverride=${ANDROID_HOME:-$HOME/Library/Android/sdk}/build-tools/35.0.0/aapt2 assembleDomesticDebug
scripts.android:apk:googleplay:release: npm run android:sync:googleplay && cd android && ./gradlew -Pandroid.aapt2FromMavenOverride=${ANDROID_HOME:-$HOME/Library/Android/sdk}/build-tools/35.0.0/aapt2 assembleGooglePlayRelease
scripts.android:aab:googleplay:release: npm run android:sync:googleplay && cd android && ./gradlew -Pandroid.aapt2FromMavenOverride=${ANDROID_HOME:-$HOME/Library/Android/sdk}/build-tools/35.0.0/aapt2 bundleGooglePlayRelease
scripts.test:compat: npm run build:h5 && npm run build:weapp
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:physics && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:compat
